dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HRES 1102 IH: Removing Representative Tony Gonzalez of Texas from certain standing committees of the House of Representatives.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Luna submitted the following resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Ethics

form.official-title: Removing Representative Tony Gonzalez of Texas from certain standing committees of the House of Representatives.

whereas.text: Whereas clause 1 of rule XXIII of the Rules of the House of Representatives provides, A Member, Delegate, Resident Commissioner, officer, or employee of the House shall behave at all times in a manner that shall reflect creditably on the House.; and
Whereas Representative Tony Gonzalez should be removed from his committee assignments in light of conduct he has exhibited: Now, therefore, be it

section.text: That the following named Member be, and is hereby, removed from the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:
